MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation IS Granted. No opposition filed. Ntc Of Hearing To Approve Stipulation For Judgment; Ntc Of Submission
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES LLC'S Hearing To Approve Stipulation For Judgment is Denied, without prejudice. Plaintiff did not file a memorandum of points and authorities in support of its motion. (CRC 3.1112(a)(3); 3.1113(a).) This motion does not fall within one of the exceptions to filing a memorandum. (CRC 3.1114(a).) Plaintiff has not identified the statutory grounds for entry of judgment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
